overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a nighttime walk through an orange neon-lit pedestrian tunnel, transitioning to an open plaza with holographic advertisements, then continuing along a wet city street with commercial buildings and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian tunnel with orange neon arches

events.description: transitions from bright orange neon tunnel into darker covered corridor
approaches the exit of the covered walkway into a brighter open area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit tunnel toward the exit

notable_agents.action: character with blonde hair and green headband walks past the camera toward the tunnel exit

entered.detail: series of glowing orange neon arches forming a tunnel ceiling and walls
green padded safety railings lining both sides of the walkway
smooth gray concrete pedestrian walkway floor
illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian tunnel illuminated by vibrant orange neon arches. The camera moves forward through the tunnel, passing green railings on both sides. A character walks past the camera heading toward the exit. The lighting transitions from bright neon to a darker corridor as the camera approaches the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertisements and central tree

events.description: exits covered corridor into open plaza with large holographic billboards and neon lighting
passes the central tree planter and approaches the street exit of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the street, passing benches and the central tree

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the plaza toward the street
person sitting on an illuminated bench on the left side

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement displaying EL GUAPO text and imagery on the left building
raised circular planter with a single tree in the center of the plaza
multiple floating holographic advertisements above the plaza buildings
modern benches with glowing orange edges where people are seated
horizontal pink neon lighting along the left building facade
tiled pavement surface of the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a spacious urban plaza illuminated by colorful holographic billboards and neon lights. A large tree sits in a central planter, while people occupy illuminated benches along the left side. The camera walks past the tree and benches, heading toward the street where the softsys building becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street corner with commercial buildings and outdoor seating

events.description: exits plaza onto city sidewalk alongside the street with the softsys building
yellow vehicle drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the softsys building and spiky plant planters

notable_agents.action: yellow car driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: commercial building with illuminated softsys signage and orange and teal facade
large rectangular planters with tall spiky plants and illuminated edges
asphalt road with orange markings and wet reflective surface
tall modern street light illuminating the sidewalk and road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the plaza onto a city sidewalk alongside a wet street. The softsys building with its distinctive signage dominates the right side, while large planters with spiky plants line the left. A yellow car drives past on the road as the camera continues walking forward, passing pedestrians and street furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under elevated highway with traffic and digital billboards

events.description: moves along street under elevated highway structure and overpass
black sports car drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk alongside the street with passing traffic under the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving along the wet street

entered.detail: large concrete overpass and elevated roadway structure above the street
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a woman's face
orange textured metal sidewalk panels with puddles reflecting lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the urban street under an elevated highway structure. The softsys building disappears behind as the camera moves forward. The street is lined with bollards and features wet pavement reflecting the neon lights. Vehicles including a black sports car pass by on the road, while large holographic billboards remain visible on the right side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit pedestrian tunnel into a sprawling, rain-slicked cyberpunk city center. It begins by moving through a covered walkway defined by vibrant orange neon arches and green railings, passing a pedestrian as the lighting dims toward the exit. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a spacious urban plaza filled with colorful holographic billboards, illuminated benches, and a central tree. The movement then shifts from the plaza onto a wet city sidewalk, passing spiky planters and a yellow car while the distinctive Softsys building dominates the skyline. Finally, the camera continues forward under an elevated highway, where the pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights and black sports cars glide past beneath towering holographic advertisements.
